prompt: Create a dramatic luxury sports poster for Bernardo Silva as a Juventus football star, in a dark cinematic black-and-gold editorial style. Vertical composition, high contrast, moody stadium atmosphere, premium poster design with layered photomontage. The background is a massive waving Juventus flag filling the upper half of the image, black fabric with broad white stripes and a large metallic gold Juventus "J" crest on the right side, topped by exactly 3 gold stars. In front of the flag, place an oversized close-up half-body portrait of the player wearing a classic Juventus home kit, facing slightly left, with wet textured hair, visible neck tattoos, dramatic rim lighting, and the face partially obscured by shadow for a mysterious heroic look. In the foreground, place a full-body action pose of the same player running forward with a soccer ball at his feet on a floodlit pitch, centered near the bottom, wearing the black-and-white striped Juventus jersey with white shorts, white socks, black boots, gold number 20 on the shorts, gold Adidas details, and the Jeep sponsor logo clearly visible. The stadium should wrap across the lower half with bright white floodlights, dark packed stands, light fog, and subtle smoke near the ground. Use elegant magazine-poster typography integrated into the composition: top left small gold text "JUVENTUS" and "FOUNDED 1897", with exactly 3 gold stars beneath; along the upper left a vertical list of 4 words in white caps: "CLASS", "VISION", "INTELLIGENCE", "WORK RATE"; beneath that a gold handwritten signature and the year split across two lines as "20" and "26"; center-left large serif player name text with the first name smaller and the last name huge, reading "BERNARDO" and "SILVA" in white; below that smaller gold text "JUVENTUS"; lower right exactly 3 gold stars above 3 stacked white words: "TRADITION", "PASSION", "GLORY"; bottom center exactly 3 gold stars above the phrase "THE OLD LADY" and smaller text "SINCE 1897". Color palette limited to black, white, charcoal, and metallic gold. Add subtle rain haze, fabric texture, vignette, glowing highlights on the crest and text, and a polished Champions League poster aesthetic.
